scenario: First passport for a minor applicant with a single custodial parent: the first parent declares sole legal custody, so no second consent holder's block is required at all (this is the realistic common case this registry's `is/thjodskra/passport-issuance-consent-minor` precedent also models, and the case an earlier draft of this schema incorrectly required a second parent's name/CPR/signature for — see VERIFICATION.md).

fields.applicantDateAndSignature: 2026-07-11, signed in person by sole custodial parent on the child's behalf
